text: Here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The modern, vibrant space dedicated to research and development speaks to human creativity and our urge to innovate. The glass barrier creates a liminal threshold—I feel invited to contemplate the boundary between imagination and realization. The colorful displays and digital screens hum with the energy of ideas in motion, making me wonder about the evolving relationship between humans and technology. I am both observer and participant in the ongoing dance of progress.
